seoTitle: Maryvale vs Masig Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maryvale and Masig Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maryvale vs Masig Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maryvale and Masig Island.
heading: Maryvale vs Masig Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maryvale, Queensland and Masig Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maryvale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Masig Island (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maryvale or Masig Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maryvale has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Masig Island scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maryvale scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Masig Island scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maryvale or Masig Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maryvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
